info.english_meaning: to sacrifice to offer to a deity to worship to get associated with to give
info.hindI_arTa: yajYa karanA havana karanA devapUjA karanAsaMgati karanA denA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'devAnAmuta yo martyAnAM yajizWaH sa prayajatAmftAvA' (f॰6.15.13) praSabdo viSezakfnna yo yajerarTaH sa eva prayajeH
'prayAjavadanUyAjaM prAyaRIyaM kAryamanUyAjavat' (tE0 saM0 61536) prAramBe yazwavyAH prayAjAH anu paScAt samAptO yazwavyA anuyAjAH
'tAMste yajYasya mAyayA sarvAnapa yajAmasi' (kO॰sU॰97) apayajAmasi=yajYenAvagamayAmaH
'yad brAhmaRAH saMyajante saKAyaH' (f॰10.71.8) saMyajante=samBUya yajante
'avapruzo vipruzaH saMyajAmi' (tE॰brA॰3.7.6.21) sAkaM juhomItyarTaH
'te vE patnIH saMyAjayizyantaH pratiparAyanti' (Sa॰brA॰1.9.2.1) patnIsaMyAjaM karizyanta ityAha pratiparAyanti=(gArhapatyaM prati) nivartante
'ete asfgramindava iti bahUnAM saMyajamAnAnAM pratipadaM kuryAt' (jE0 brA0 194 ) saMyajamAnAnAM sAkaM juhvatAm
'tAMste yajYasya mAyayA sarvAn (varuRasya pASAn) avayajAmahe' (tE0 brA0 31082) avayajAmahe=yajYakarmaRA parARudAmaH
'sunvAno hi zmA yajatyava dvizaH' (f0 1337) uktacara evArTaH
'ava devAnAM yaja heqo agne' (aTarva0 1934) avayaja=tiraskuru yajatiH pUjAkarmA avastadvEparItyakft pUjAyASca vEparItyamanAdaraH parAkriyA
'yadenaScakfmA vayamidaM tadavayajAmahe' (vA0 saM0 345) avayajAmahe=apanodayAmaH=apAkurmaH
'yA te agne sUrye SuciH priyA tanUryA divi yA''ditye yA bfhati yA jAgate Candasi tAM ta etenAvayaje' (Apa0 SrO0 54164) avayaje=yaje=pUjayAmi atrAnarTako'vaH
'yadekasyADi DarmaRi tasyAvayajanamasi' (vA0 saM0 2017)
'yA tezAmavayA durizwiH' (aTarva0 2351) avayA avayajanaM yAgAnanuzWAnam iti sAyaRaH apakarzavacano'vo'tra naYarTe vartate sADIyasI KalvezA vfttiH
'avezwA dandaSUkAH' (Sa0 brA0 5411) avezwA dUrIkftA apanunnAH
'prajAH sfzwvAMho'vayajya so'kAmayata vftraM hanyAmiti' (mE0 saM0 11014) aMho'vayajya=aMho'vejya=pApmAnaM vipUya
'yaToditameva varuRamava yajate' (tE0 saM0 6312) avayajate yajate ava iha viSezako na tadviralam
‘ftuBya eva rudraM niravayajate’ (kA0 saM0 216) niravayajate=nirdadAti
'yeByo hotrAM praTamAmAyeje manuH' (f0 10637) Ayajati=aByarcati prArTayate vA
'yasmE tvamAyajase sa sADatyanarvA kzeti daDate suvIryam' (f0 1942) Ayajasi dadAsi pradiSasi
'prajAvadasme draviRA''yajasva' (vA0 saM0 144) Ayajasza datsva
'mayi devA draviRamA yajantAm' (aTarva0 535) AyajantAm=dadatu
'AyAgaBUtaM nfpatestasya veSmani rAGava' (rA0 13113) AyAgaBUtaM yajanIyadevatABUtam
'A hi zmA sUnave pitApiryajatyApaye saKA saKye vareRyaH' (f0 1263) Ayajati dadAti
'yaH svAM devatAmatiyajate' (tE0 saM0 2544) atikramya devatAntaraM yajata ityAha
'aTAtyupayajati sa yannAtyupayajedyAvatyo hEvAgre sfzwAstAvatyo hEva syurna prajAyeran' (Sa0 brA0 38418) atyupayajati upayAjAnkaroti BUyo yajati
'vizRu rvE yajYasya durizwaM pAti varuRaH svizwam' (E0 brA0 338) nigadavyAKyAtam
'devatA aBiyajet' (go0 gf0 4716) havirBiH pUjayedityAha
'AmAvAsyena havizA pUrvapakzamaBiyajate'  (paYcarA0 3712) ukto'rTaH
'pakzAntA upavastavyAH pakzAdayo'BiyazwavyAH' (go0 gf0 155-6)
'Ajyenetare pratiyajanta Asate' (Sa0 brA0 46819) pratiyajantaH kenApyuddeSena yajantaH
'atra vA diSaH pratiyajet' (Apa0 SrO0 782514) pratidiSaM yAgaM kuryAdityarTaH
'yaTA pUrveByaH… sahasrasAH paryayA vAjamindo' (f0 9525) paryayAH=paryayajaTAH yAgenArjitamadiTAH
'tadDEka AhurDAtArameva sarvAsAM purastAdAjyena pariyajeta' (E0 brA0 347) pariyajeta parito yajet
'rAjYA (=somena) vapAM pariyajati' (Sa0 brA0 132113) amuKyAmAhutiM juhotItyarTaH
'parivedanI kanyA paridAyI dAtA pariyazwA yAjakaH' (yAjYa0 3265 mitAkzarAyAM hArItavacanam ) jyezWaM parityajya kanizWasya yAjakaH pariyazwA Bavati
'paryAhita-parIzwa-parivitti-parivinna-parivividAnezu' (Apa0 Da0 251222) jyezWe'kftasomayAge kftasomayAgaH kanizWaH pariyazwA jyezWaH parIzwaH
'striyaScopayajeran' (pA0 gf0 21718) upayajeran balikarma kuryuH
